title: erigeron decumbens
intro: Erigeron decumbens, also known as a spreading fleabane, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Erigeron decumbens include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infection. Erigeron decumbens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
